questionHtml: Using the data, discuss the implications for the advice given by dieticians to patients.
markschemeHtml:
a. increasing the mass of almonds eaten increases the energy content of feces ✔

b. some of the energy consumed in foods may not be absorbed/is lost/egested in feces ✔

c. can’t draw conclusions as the data is incomplete ✔

meta.title: Using the data, discuss the implications for the advice given by dieticians to patients.
